name: Celery cloud
description: Celery cloud — Distributed task queue for Python using Redis or RabbitMQ as brokers for background job processing.

seo.title: Celery cloud — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Celery cloud: Celery cloud — Distributed task queue for Python using Redis or RabbitMQ as brokers for background job processing.

when_to_use: Async task queue for long-running Python data jobs
Scheduled celery beat jobs for periodic data sync
Distributed task processing across multiple workers
Email queue offloaded from synchronous Django request
Background ML inference pipeline with Redis broker

review.verdict: Celery itself remains the Python job-queue default—just be sure which 'cloud' vendor you're evaluating.
review.best_for: Python backends needing a mature, flexible distributed task queue
review.not_for: Teams wanting minimal configuration or non-Python workers
